dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6750 IH: To codify Executive Order 14388 (relating to improving our Nation through better design).
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Houchin introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To codify Executive Order 14388 (relating to improving our Nation through better design).

section.text: Executive Order 14388 (90 Fed Reg. 41759; relating to improving our Nation through better design) shall have the force and effect of law.
